dialogueLines.text: Look, there is that guy you talked to earlier in the day, Barry.
It looks like he is arguing with someone, do you know who he is talking to?.

choices.text: I can't remember I wasn't really paying attention durring his whole story.

dialogueLines.text: So thats the guy he was talking about at the graveyard, you should see why they are arguing.
Thats the guy he was mourning at the graveyard, Darry.  Go figure out why they are arguing with each other..
I think you should go see what they are arguing about over there.
